title: Crypto Swap Quote Expired: What It Means Before You Send
keyQuestions: What does crypto swap quote expired mean?
Can I still send funds after a swap quote expires?
Is an expired quote the same as a failed swap?
What happens if I already sent funds after the quote expired?
How does fixed-rate quote timing affect a swap route?
Does a floating-rate swap quote expire?
What should I check before creating a new crypto swap quote?
quickSteps: Check whether the quote is still active before opening your wallet send screen.
Prepare the source wallet, destination address, network choice, amount, and fee setting before starting a timed quote.
Create a fresh quote if the timer has expired, instead of sending from an old tab, screenshot, or memory.
If funds were already sent after expiry, collect a narrow proof packet with public transaction facts and avoid sending again.
Proceed only when the current route, wallet prompt, quote state, and transaction details all match.

issueRouting.start: A crypto swap quote has expired and the user needs to decide whether to send, refresh the route, or handle a late deposit.

branches.if: The quote expired before funds were sent
then: Do not send into the expired quote.
Prepare the source wallet, destination address, network choice, amount, and fee setting.
Create or refresh the quote and send only when the current route and wallet prompt match.

branches.if: Funds were already sent after the quote expired
then: Stop adding new transactions to the route.
Save the transaction ID, source chain, amount, send time, route identifier, and current status.
Follow the official support path with narrow public transaction facts.

branches.if: The user is unsure whether the issue is quote expiry or confirmation delay
then: Check whether the transaction was broadcast before or after the quote expired.
Separate quote validity from source-chain confirmation status.
Use the current route status and transaction facts before deciding the next action.

riskNotes: An expired quote means the displayed route conditions may no longer be valid.
A wallet may still allow a send even when the third-party quote window has already closed.
Old tabs and screenshots can preserve stale route details that should not be used for execution.
Sending again after a late or unclear deposit can create duplicate deposits and support confusion.
A quote-expiry support case needs public transaction facts, not seed phrases, private keys, wallet backups, or remote access.
